description: Medium task requiring ontology-level inference from medications and proxies.

trials.inclusion_criteria: Hypertension with persistent BP >= 140/90 or active antihypertensive therapy.
Type 2 Diabetes with HbA1c >= 7.0 and oral anti-diabetic treatment.
Hyperlipidemia with LDL >= 160 mg/dL or current statin escalation.
trials.exclusion_criteria: Active liver disease or ALT > 120 U/L.
